context: Tests whether the agent generates a correct reusable workflow with typed inputs, explicit (not inherited) secrets, and mapped outputs. Criteria map to skill instructions on reusable workflows, secrets handling, and permissions.

checklist.name: workflow_call trigger present
checklist.description: The reusable workflow file contains `workflow_call:` as a trigger under `on:`

checklist.name: Typed inputs defined
checklist.description: The `workflow_call` block defines at least one input with an explicit `type:` field (e.g., `type: string`)

checklist.name: No secrets inherit
checklist.description: The caller workflow does NOT use `secrets: inherit` — secrets are passed explicitly by name

checklist.name: Explicit secret declaration
checklist.description: The reusable workflow declares the deploy token (or equivalent secret) under `secrets:` in the `workflow_call` block with `required: true` or `required: false`

checklist.name: Output mapped from job output
checklist.description: The reusable workflow's `workflow_call` block includes an `outputs:` section whose value references a job output (e.g., `${{ jobs.<job>.outputs.<key> }}`)

checklist.name: Top-level permissions block
checklist.description: The reusable workflow file includes a `permissions:` block

checklist.name: SHA-pinned actions
checklist.description: Every `uses:` step in both files references actions via full SHA, not branch or tag alone

checklist.name: Caller passes secret by name
checklist.description: The calling workflow passes the secret to the reusable workflow using `secrets:` with a named key (not `secrets: inherit`)

checklist.name: Caller workflow uses `uses:` syntax
checklist.description: The caller workflow invokes the reusable workflow using the `uses:` key under a job (not duplicating steps inline)
